prompt:
A single pine board rests on a workbench, its light-colored grain, knots, and smooth planed surface clearly visible along the full length of the plank. One end is slightly cut off in the frame, and a measuring tape, pencil, and square lie nearby, ready to mark it for a beginner woodworking project. The board looks lightweight and easy to handle, emphasizing its suitability for simple, entry-level builds.

The scene is a near-future solarpunk workshop with soft, warm lighting, a few other boards stacked neatly in the background, and organized tools on a pegboard. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no logos or text on any tools, and a composition that keeps the pine board as the main focus while the rest of the shop environment stays softly blurred.
